narrative:
Dover East (precinct in Athens County) has 965 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.3 percentage points.
